rationale: Subdim defined but never used in any record. Pass A: 0 refs. Pass B: no cascade. Pass C: safe.

rationale: Detailed scan: Frontend HAS 12 PRF_* refs across 6 dims (initial scan limited to registry.tsx misled). Backend has only 6 refs all in single report_service.py (centralized lookup, NOT scattered hardcoding). NO REFACTOR NEEDED.

rationale: 33 L15 stub records reviewed. They are paper-specific definition templates (not effect-size findings). 3-pass vote: KEEP as-is. Their evidence_id suffix _L15 already self-documents the type.
note: L15 suffix in evidence_id is the existing convention for definition-template records. No schema change.

decision: KEEP_AS_IS — intentional design, not a bug
